heading: Support for VPC Peering and Private Endpoints
body:
The following table lists the current support status for [VPC/VNet peering](vpc-peering)
and [private endpoint connections](private-endpoint) for source and destination
clusters that you live migrate to Atlas.
Select the tab for replica sets or sharded clusters.<Tab tabid="replica">
  Replica Sets

  | Cloud Provider            | VPC Peering | Private Endpoints |
  | ------------------------- | ----------- | ----------------- |
  | Azure (Microsoft Azure)   |             |                   |
  | AWS (Amazon Web Services) |             |                   |
  | Google Cloud              |             |                   |
</Tab>Sharded Clusters| Cloud Provider            | VPC Peering | Private Endpoints |
| ------------------------- | ----------- | ----------------- |
| Azure (Microsoft Azure)   |             |                   |
| AWS (Amazon Web Services) |             |                   |
| Google Cloud              |             |                   |
